title: Crispy German Pan-Seared Eggplant
description: A classic German dish, this recipe is a delicious twist on eggplant, pan-seared to perfection.
instructions: 1. Slice the eggplant into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together flour and a pinch of salt.
3. In a separate dish, beat the eggs.
4. In a third dish, mix together breadcrumbs and a pinch of salt.
5. Dip each eggplant slice into the flour mixture, coating both sides.
6. Dip the floured eggplant slice into the eggs, making sure to coat completely.
7. Finally, coat the eggplant slice in the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
8. Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
9. Pan-sear the eggplant slices for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
10. Serve with creamy sauce over the top.
